text: Can a corona motor work in reverse to produce electricity by moving the shaft?

text: Robert ….I love you work content and spirit, but for Heavens sake, spend 50 bob and get a digital remote mic and let us hear the voice clearly !

author: @infinitesolarforall3901
text: And there you have it, electric fields want to spin in spirals, always. That 2D image on the oscilloscope is actually 3D, it’s a spiral, not a wave!

He'll have to actually do some math. And pay attention 😅

text: Would be interesting to see how much work on an electrostatic motor you can get out of insulated rod from the Benjamin Franklin sentry box experiment. I'd try it but don't want to end up like Georg Wilhem Richmann lol
